title: Scoped accent overrides
tagline: Per-project & per-language color control — your accent now follows your context.

slides.title: Every project in its own color
slides.body: Open Work, your Pet project, and an Outsource repo side by side — each window keeps its own accent the moment you focus it. No keyboard shortcut, no manual switch: the color is pinned per project and follows focus.

slides.title: Pin an accent to a project
slides.body: Open Settings → Ayu Islands → Accent → Overrides and add the project you're in. Pick any color from the swatch grid or shuffle a contrast-aware random one. Switch IntelliJ windows and each project keeps its own tint — the focus-swap kicks in instantly.

slides.title: Pin an accent to a programming language
slides.body: Same panel, different scope: bind Kotlin → cyan, Python → gold, Terraform → lavender. Whenever a project's dominant language matches and no project override exists, the language accent wins. Stops you guessing which repo is which.
